## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist
- [ ] Commit messages follow `[ADD/FIX/IMP] module: description` format
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new/changed functionality
- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`USE_MOCK_LLM=true pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] No PII or secrets committed (check `.env` is not staged)
- [ ] Frontend builds cleanly (`npm run build` in `frontend/`)
